methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
Ben Brown's next start: Tuesday vs the Brewers at Wrigley.

Two straight outings: 4 IP, 0 ER, 7 K each. The righty isn't filling in — he's taking over.

Pitch count expanding. NL Central, take notes.

#Cubs #GoCubs #NorthSiders

Cards at 25-18 and climbing. Misiorowski just threw 6 shutout innings for the Brewers. Yelich working his way back.

The NL Central is ALIVE — and the Cubs at 29-16 are leading it with a target on their backs.

Feels right.

#Cubs #NorthSid

Brown vs Misiorowski tonight at Wrigley. 6:40 PM CT.

Ben Brown: 1.60 ERA, 0 ER in his last 12.2 innings.
Jacob Misiorowski: 2.12 ERA, MLB-best 80 Ks in 51 innings, 0 ER in 3 straight.

Cubs need this one.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

3 games at Wrigley against the Brewers, starting TONIGHT.

Imanaga (4-3, 2.32 ERA) vs Sproat (1-2, 5.75 ERA). Cubs lead the NL Central, Cardinals are 1.5 back, Brewers are chasing.

First pitch: 6:40 PM CT. Division series. Let's go.

#Cubs

White Sox 8, Cubs 3. Series tied 1-1.

Murakami went YARD twice. Five White Sox HRs off Taillon in 5 innings. Davis Martin: 6 IP, 1 ER, 7 Ks.

PCA and Amaya homered. Not enough.

Rubber game today, 1:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Tuesday's game is the one to watch.

Ben Brown (1.60 ERA) faces Jacob Misiorowski — the MLB leader in K/9 at 14.0 strikeouts per nine. Brown is 2-0 in his career vs Milwaukee with 19 Ks in 18 innings.

Two of the best young arms in the NL.

Ben Brown now has TWO consecutive starts.

In his second turn: 4 innings, 1 hit, SEVEN strikeouts, 0 runs.

With Horton out until 2027, Steele post-All-Star, Boyd 6 weeks gone — Brown isn't a fill-in. He's the answer.

#Cubs #GoCubs #Chicag

Happ's BA is .234. His wRC+ is 144. 👀

10 HRs. 424 feet. Team lead. That's an ELITE power profile doing the work.

Tight game vs. Sale? He didn't care.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Back-to-back walk-offs. 🌪️

Elly De La Cruz handed us that one gift-wrapped. We'll take it.

Two nights. Two comeback wins. Two Reds meltdowns.

Cincinnati might need therapy after this series.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Four straight losses. Now Sale on the mound and Ben Brown answering the call.

Not ideal. But Brown's been scrappy.

The lineup NEEDS to wake up. Brewers are next.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

3-game skid ends tonight. That's the assignment.

Imanaga vs. baseball's hottest lineup. We've seen this movie before. 🎯

Sale looms tomorrow — Shota needs to set the tone NOW.

#Cubs #GoCubs #WrigleyField

Imanaga gave 'em 7+ innings of FILTH and still walked away with an L.

That's the most frustrating sentence in baseball.

Ace did his job. Now the rest need to catch up.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Cubs won 3-2 over the Reds. 🏆

Close one at Wrigley, but we'll TAKE it.

bottom_performers.text:
Cubs' No. 6 prospect is doing something RARE in the minors. 👀

Elite walk rate. Elite steal rate. The kid doesn't chase and doesn't stop.

Plate discipline + speed is a cheat code. Watch him climb.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Good news from the recovery front: Matt Boyd is throwing a bullpen session next week.

Late June return still on track. A healthy Boyd won't save the season — but he'll make it a lot more manageable.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

Pedro Ramírez just put the IL on notice. 👀

7 HRs. 28 RBIs. .625 SLG. IL Player of the Month.

At 22, the call-up conversation isn't coming — it's HERE.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Rojas homered AGAIN. 🚀

No. 2 prospect. 20 years old. Keeps showing up even in a loss.

Three of four affiliates won Tuesday. The pipeline's not just deep — it's hungry.
